km.Monmouth Wales: មូនមូូត, មូនមូូធសហីរេ, វេលស៍, អូនីតេដគីងដូម

zh.Monmouth Wales: 英國威爾斯蒙姆爾蒙姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhys ap Gruffudd於1123年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾蒙姆斯時，他的父親Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth42歲，母親Anarawd33歲。他於1148年與Ystedur Verch Caradog在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾蒙姆斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Monmouth Wales: 英国威尔斯蒙姆爾蒙姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rhys ap Gruffudd于1123年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾蒙姆斯时，他的父亲Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth42岁，母亲Anarawd33岁。他于1148年与Ystedur Verch Caradog在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾蒙姆斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhys ap Gruffudd was born in 1123, in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth, was 42 and his mother, Anarawd, was 33. He married Ystedur Verch Caradog in 1148, in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.Monmouth Wales: Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhys ap Gruffudd est né en 1123, à Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Anarawd, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Ystedur Verch Caradog en 1148, à Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rhys ap Gruffudd 1123 in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth 42 und seine Mutter Anarawd 33. Er hat 1148 in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom Ystedur Verch Caradog geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

ht.Monmouth Wales: Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys ap Gruffudd è nato il nel 1123 nel Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Anarawd, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Ystedur Verch Caradog nel 1148, nel Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.Monmouth Wales: イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウス
ja.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Gruffuddが1123年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウスで生まれた時，父Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarthは42歳，母Anarawdは33歳であった。1148年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウスでYstedur Verch Caradogと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Gruffudd(이)가 1123년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Anarawd(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1148년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스에서 Ystedur Verch Caradog(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

mg.Monmouth Wales: Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

mn.Monmouth Wales: Monmouth, Trefynwy, Уэльс, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys ap Gruffudd nasceu em 1123, em Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Anarawd, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Ystedur Verch Caradog em 1148, em Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ro.Monmouth Wales: Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhys ap Gruffudd родился в 1123 г. в местности монмоут, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Anarawd, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Ystedur Verch Caradog в 1148 г. в местности монмоут, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rhys ap Gruffudd nació en 1123, en Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffydd ap Rhys Prince Of Deheubarth, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Anarawd, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Ystedur Verch Caradog en 1148, en Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
